name: Seiya Takehaya
description: __Height:__ 175 cm (5’9) Seiya Takehaya is a first-year student at Kazemai High School and a member of the kyudo club, as well as serving as the club head and captain of the boys' division. Seiya is viewed as a mature, reliable, and kind character, determined to facilitate and oversee [Minato](https://anilist.co/character/128273/)'s success in kyudo. name: Shintarou Jagasaki
description: Jagasaki works as a night patrol in a town called Buppa. Although he has the authority due to his job, he seems to have lack of perseverance even towards some street thugs. His catchphrase is "shoot 'em up", while pretending his right hand is a gun.

name: Tenn Kujo
description: **Height:** 173 cm He has an outward appearance of a little devil kind of character, is a perfectionist and is strict when it comes to competency. He vowed to himself that whenever he is in public, 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, he will give his best for a perfect performance. Because of his high level of professionalism, even for those who knew him previously, it is easily misunderstand that he has a cold personality. (Source: IDOLiSH7 Wikia)

name: Ame
description: Ame is the youngest wolf child. He is shy and quite weak. He looks awfully lot like his father. He is a year younger than his older sister, Yuki ~! Later in the movie, Ame wants to be a wild wolf instead of a normal human like Yuki. Ame later goes onto living in the mountains to pursue his dream of living as a wild lone wolf. He would sometimes call out to his mother in the wind of the mountains.!~

name: Anna Anjou
description: A high school student and a gyaru in the same class as Seto, whom she teases and flirts with constantly. Outside of school, she hangs out with Seto or helps out with her mom at the hair salon. Her dream is to become a stylist and she has a surprising talent when it comes to hairdressing.

name: Izumi Akazawa
description: __Occupation__: Middle School Student __Grade__: 3rd year, 3rd class ~! name: Rachel
description: __Species:__ Human __Rank:__ Extra Rachel, also known as Michelle Light was Baam's best and only friend as she was the only one to visit him in his "cave". She longs to see the stars which is one of the fabled rewards waiting at the top of the Tower, because she "fears the Night". ~!Like Baam she is an Irregular.!~

name: Roka Shibasaki
description: The president of the Game Creation Club (Provisional). She refers her element as "Fire", but later states that her true element is actually "Darkness." Her main combat method is putting a bag over her opponents' head, rendering them blind, hence the darkness element. She carries a lot of spare bags so she can use them anytime. name: Shio Koube
description: Shio Kobe is a young, innocent girl who lives with Satou Matsuzaka in their apartment. She loves and cares for Satou deeply, but often remains blissfully unaware of Satou's endeavors aside from Satou's necessary attendance in school and work, as she is not allowed outside of the apartment. Shio is a kind and innocent girl who tries her best to work hard and watch over the house while Satou is away at school and work. name: Tania
description: Tania is a red dragon, a member of Dragon Tribe, and is traveling the world challenging worthy fighters until Rein and Kanade defeat her. After befriending them, she joins the party, making her his second contractual.

name: Bum Yoon
description: Yoon Bum had a rather obsessive tendency towards things and people that showing some sorts of kindness to him due to "Borderline Personality Disorder" (BPD) as revealed in the first chapter. Bum’s life is measured in moments of rejection, hostility, and emptiness, with Sang-Woo as the only constant ironically providing him a sense of connection.

name: Hakaze Kusaribe
description: The princess of the sorcerers and the strongest sorceress in history, she was left in a desert island to die by the leader of Kusaribe clan, Samon. Since the Island did not allow the use of magic, she joins Mahiro's quest to revenge Aika's death, and her own revenge against Samon. name: Hoon Lee
description: After the death of his mother and the great debt left by his alcoholic, gambling-addict father, Hoon Lee tries to survive every day from bullying and rent. After so much he decided to end his life, but he can't find a less painful way to do it.

name: John
description: John is one of the side protagonists in the Shadows House series and the shadow living under the care of the "Living Face", [Shaun](https://anilist.co/character/197306/Shaun). John is known to be quite friendly with everyone and very open-minded. Unlike many shadows, he treats Shaun with respect and even offers to wear glasses so that Shaun can be seen while wearing his. name: Laboon
description: __Height:__ 400 m (1312'4") __Affiliations:__ Rumbar Pirates (former); Crocus Laboon is an extremely large whale (of comparable or greater size than the monsters in Calm Belt), native to West Blue, whom the Straw Hat Pirates encounter immediately after entering Grand Line. Fifty years earlier, Laboon had been left at the bottom of Reverse Mountain by a group of pirates who had befriended him.
